programmes.show_description: Is é an t-iománaí as Aontroim Neil McManus a bheidh faoi chaibidil sa gclár seo. (This programme focuses on Antrim hurler Neil McManus.)
Tá cara le Sam ag iarraidh deireadh a chur le caidreamh Sam agus Diane. (Sam's friend hopes to put an end to Sam and Diane's relationship.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Scéal 4 chapall mór le rá a bheidh sa gclár seo - Limestone Lad, Danoli, Dorans Pride agus Beef Or Salmon. (We take a look at Ireland's most famous National Hunt horses.)
Buaicphointí ó chluichí CLG an deireadh seachtaine, Iomáint, Peil, Peil na mBan agus Liathróid Láimhe san áireamh. (Highlights of the weekend's GAA action.)
Mollaí Ní Mhiacháin as Tír Chonaill a chaitheann cuid mhór dá pá ar éadaí a bheidh linn inniu. (In Donegal student Mollaí Ní Mhiacháin spends most of her income on clothes.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Faigheann Bréidín amach go gcuireann ceol fonn damhsa ort ach ní maith le Clúmh é sin! (Tweedy discovers that music can really make you move, and that Fluff doesn't like that!)
Beidh na Singalings ag tabhairt aghaidh ar an Artach inniu. (Today the Singalings are going to the Arctic.)
Is iomaí dath liath ann. (Today, we find out that there are lots of different shades of Grey.)
Tá Cory ag ceapadh nach dteastaíonn feighlí leanaí uaidh. (Cory thinks that he's too grown-up to be babysat by Caoimhe.)
Tá an tUasal Easóige cinnte go mbeidh an bua aige sa rás mór. (Weasel is sure he'll win the big race.)
Is pailé-ointeolaithe iad Abby agus Rudy atá ag cuardach iontaisí. (Basket turns Abby and Rudy into paleontologists to uncover three different fossils.)
Meas tú cén fáth a bhfuil an méid sin plástar ag teastáil ó Loscán? (Why does Froggy need so many "plasters"?)
Tá leabharlann ag Cnag ina teachín crainn ach is faoi chnónna na leabhair uile atá aici! (Crunch has started a library in her tree house, but her books are all about nuts!)
Goideann Romeo meall raiceála agus féachann le meaisín pionnliathróide a dhéanamh as an gcathair. (Romeo plans to turn the whole city into a giant pinball machine.)
Tugann Wussywat cúnamh do Ird athchúrsáil a dhéanamh ar an mbruscar. (Wussywat helps Ird recycle a load of rubbish until the bags get blown away.)
Rachaidh Zou, Elzee agus Daideo sa tóir ar eachtráin inniu. (Zou, Elzee and Grandpa go in search of aliens today.)
Tá Ricky ag iarraidh eitilt leis na teireadachtalaigh inniu. (Today, Ricky wants to fly like the pterodactyls.)
Scaoileann Ginger Cnócócódóin óga saor ach níl an rud ceart déanta aici is cosúil! (Ginger releases a cage of baby Coconutdons into the jungle.)
Tá Dot le haire a thabhairt do chat Ruby ar an deireadh seachtaine. (Dot takes care of Ruby's cat for the weekend.)
Foghlaimeoidh Henry nach gcaithfidh tú a bheith in éineacht le do dhlúthchara i gcónaí. (Henry learns that you don't have to be with someone all the time in order to be friends.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá Charlie curtha soir ag Lola mar gheall nach mbíonn sí ag éisteacht. (Lola isn't listening properly and it's very frustrating for Charlie.)
Téann Pinocchio sa seans agus socraíonn sé rud éigin a ghoid ón Mac Tíre Crosta. (Pinocchio throws caution to the wind and decides to steal from the Big Bad Wolf.)
Téann Lola agus Pat in iomaíocht le Victor agus leis na Guanos. (Lola and Pat fight off Victor and the Guanos in order to get all the ingredients for their super smoothie party.)
Caithfidh Angelo agus a cairde an t-ionad spóirt a ghlanadh - mar a bheadh físchluiche ann. (Angelo and his friends must clean up the rec centre - videogame style.)
Téann Dónall agus Learaí chuig cóisir Pheigí faoi rún chun go bhfeicfidh siad an siamsóir atá ann. (Henry and Peter sneak into Margaret's party.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoin zú. (A fun song about let's go to the zoo.)
Faigheann na Blocuimhreacha amach go bhfuil siad ar fad difriúil óna chéile. (Seven shows the others how to be lucky: ask a number friend to jump on your head!)
Bíonn spraoi ag Dearg ag dathú. (Red has fun coloring.)
Faigheann Gabh agus Stop pónairí draíochta agus fásann siad plandaí iontacha. (Go and Stop are given some magic beans and make amazingly shaped plants.)
Beidh an coimeádaí zú John ag tabhairt aire do na léamair rua-rufach inniu. (John the zookeeper will be looking after the red-ruffed lemurs today.)
Tá Pip ag iarraidh ar Posy dul chuig an bpáirc in éineacht leis ach tá sise ag iarraidh fanacht ina cuid éadaí codlata. (Pip wants Posy to go to the park to meet their friends.)
An féidir anraith a dhéanamh as clocha? (Stone soup? Is it even possible?)
Amhrán faoi bheith i do chaptaen eitleáin a bheidh le cumadh ag Gaelscoil Ultain i Muineachán. (Gaelscoil Ultain in Monaghan write a song about being an aeroplane captain.)
Tá George ag iarraidh fanacht ina dhúiseacht chun na réaltaí go léir sa spéir a chomhaireamh. (George wants to stay awake long enough to count all the stars in the sky.)
Samhlaíonn Isabelle a saol ina dearthóir nuair a bheidh sí mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Isabelle imagines her life as a designer with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Tá uair an chloig le caitheamh ag Zou sula mbeidh Elzee in ann dul ag spraoi. (Zou has to wait for an hour before Elzee can play with him.)
Tá ceolchoirm ag na Doobydoos inniu ach an mbeidh gach rud i gceart? (The Doobydoo's concert is happening today but will everything go according to plan?)
Pearóid ag damhsa, madra ag glanadh fuinneog & cat a ndéantar suathaireacht air a bheidh againn inniu. (On today's programme we have parrots dancing and dogs cleaning windows.)
Máire Uí Chaoimh as Acaill a bheidh ag Comhrá le Máirtín an tseachtain seo. (Máire Uí Chaoimh from Achill Island will be on Comhrá this week with Máirtín Tom Sheáinín.)
Tá comharsana nua ag Malcolm agus tá siad níos measa ná a theaghlach féin. (New neighbours, who turn out to be even more awful than Malcolm's family, move in next door.)
Tá foireann cispheile sa tóir ar thraenálaí agus socraíonn Coach tabhairt faoin bpost. (A baseball team is looking for a trainer and the Coach decides to give it another go.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (A look back at songs we knew growing up.)
Tá díocas ar Jessica le teacht ar an té a mharaigh fear céile a cara. (Jessica is fired up to find the true murderer of her friend's husband.)
Tá babhta ceannais Réalta agus Gaolta buailte linn! Á chur i láthair ag Síomha Ní Ruairc. (It's the final of Réalta agus Gaolta! Presented by Síomha Ní Ruairc.)

programmes.show_name: Taste of Australia with Hayden Quinn
programmes.show_description: Réitíonn Hayden agus a chara Amina ceann d'oidis Amina le luí na gréine. (Hayden and his friend Amina cook one of Amina's recipes together as the sun goes down.)

Ar an mBaile Riabhach i gCorca Dhuibhne a bheidh Síle. (Síle visits An Baile Riabhach, a townland just west of Dingle in Co. Kerry.)

Is í Tara Breathnach a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Tara Breathnach.)
Tá sé in am folcadh a thógáil! (It's bath time! Time to get clean!)
Is breá leis an triúr seo ceol a sheinm a chéile. (There are 3 little friends and their favourite thing to do is play music instruments together.)
Bíonn spraoi ag na Clódóirí ag déanamh dathanna éagsúla. (The Printing Crew have lots of fun making different colours.)
Bíonn ríméad ar Cory ó tharla go mbeidh sé ag fanacht thar oíche Tigh Thuathail. (Cory is ecstatic to stay over at the O'Tools' house.)
Oíche Shamhna atá ann agus tá na Meicneoirí ag imirt bob nó bia. (The Mechanics go trick or treating on Halloween.)
Beidh Elmo ag foghlaim faoi bholgáin inniu. (Elmo is learning all about bubbles today.)
Tá an-spraoi ag Pip agus Posy ag déanamh hataí amaideacha. Geallann siad go gcaithfidh siad chuig an bpáirc iad. (Pip and Posy have fun making silly hats.)
Tá éad ar Tib agus ar Bobble mar go bhfuil gradam buaite ag Lalloo. (It's Awards' Day in the forest. When Lalloo wins a prize, Bobble and Tib get jealous.)
Tá an Ninja Oíche tar éis meaisín Romeo a ghoid! (Night Ninja has taken Romeo's machine!)
Tá boladh aisteach sa ngairdín agus téann Wussywat á fhiosrú. (Wussywat wants to find out where the stinky smell is coming from so she goes on a sniff chase.)
Tá iarsmalann ag Clifford de na rudaí ar fad a caitheadh amach ar fud an bhaile thar na blianta. (Clifford has set up a museum.)
Foghlaimeoidh na cairde faoi réaltaí agus réaltbhuíonta. (The pups learn about stars and constellations.)
Tá Cíobhaímamat óg sáinnithe ar phíosa sneachta atá ag leá. (A baby Kiwimammathus gets stuck on a small patch of fast-melting snow.)
Caithfidh Hal agus Dot dul ar shiúlóid charthanachta. (Hal and Dot have to go on a charity walk.)
Is aoibhinn le Bean Berg féileacáin agus ba bhreá léi dá mbeidís ina gairdín. (Mrs Berg loves butterflies and wants them to visit her garden.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tugann Lotta féirín do Lola ach ní maith léi ar chor ar bith é. (Lola receives a gift from Lotta that she doesn't like at all.)
Bíonn éad ar Kitt nuair a chabhraíonn Emma le síota atá gortaithe agus ar strae. (Emma helps a lost and wounded Cheetah causing Kitt to get jealous.)
Tugann Pat Caipín chuig an tréidlia mar go bhfuil imní air go bhfuil píosa de phuzal slogtha aige. (Pat has to rush Caipín to the vet, but the Guanos are out looking for trouble.)
Tá duine éigin ag iarraidh an cluiche Wiznamail a scriosadh go deo. (Someone is trying to shut down 'Wiznimals'.)

Amhrán spraíúil faoi sheasamh i ndiaidh a chéile i líne  a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about lining up!)
Rachaidh na Blocuimhreacha ar fad i gcomórtas lena chéile ag Railí na mBlocuimhreacha. (Ten riders, ten pedal-powered cars, but only one can lift the trophy.)
Téann Gorm ar aistear beag. (Blue goes on a little adventure.)
Tugann na Trí Bhéar faoin stáitse nuair a bhíonn an banna ceoil tinn. (The Three Bears step in to help when the band are too ill to play in the show.)
Tá mama ar a bealach le cuidiú leis na hioraí iora óg a thabhairt ar an saol. (Mom is on her way to the squirrel family.)
Inniu breithlá Sheáin. Tá borróg bhlasta faighte aige chomh maith le roinnt bronntanas. (Today is Seán's birthday. He eats a tasty bun and gets a few presents.)
Tá Posy ag an gclós súgartha ach níl sí in ann Loscán a fháil in áit ar bith. (Posy is at the playground but can't find Froggy anywhere.)
Clár ealaíne ina ndéanann Máire Treasa ceardaíocht agus ealaín lena cara Scú Scú Scuab. (An exciting art series where Máire Treasa does arts and crafts with Scú Scú Scuab.)
Tá soilse na cathrach ag teacht idir Dot agus na réaltaí. (The lights of the city are coming between Dot and the stars.)
Caithfidh Dot feabhas a chur ar a cuid damhsa don chóisir damhsa. (Dot has to improve her dance moves for the dance party.)
Samhlaíonn Faith-Leigh a saol ina hinnealtóir nuair a bheidh sí mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Faith-Leigh imagines her life as an engineer with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Imríonn Zou, Daideo agus Elzee cluiche folach bíog. (Zou, Grandpa and Elzee play a game of hide and seek.)
An bhfuil ortha ann le cuidiú linn teacht ar eochair Tigh MewMew go sciobtha? (Is there a spell to help our friends find the key to Mewmew's house and fast?)
Beidh muc atá ina peata, toirtís a bhfuil ocras air agus bréagán a thagann chun beatha ar chlár an lae inniu! (We have a pet pig, a hungry tortoise plus a toy comes to life!)
Pádraig Ó Laighin a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín an tseachtain seo. (Pádraig Ó Laighin is this week's guest.)
Éiríonn Hal as a phost agus rún aige a bheith ina ealaíontóir. (Hal quits his job to become an artist.)
Deir an t-údar Dick Cavett go seolfaidh sé chuimhní cinn Sam chuig a fhoilsitheoir. (Author Dick Cavett offers to send Sam's memoirs to his publisher.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (A look back at songs we grew up with.)
Tugann Jessica lámh chúnta do Shirriam in Arizona, nuair is dúnmharú an toradh a bhíonn ar ualach airgid a aimsítear. (Jessica helps a sheriff investigate a murder in Arizona.)
Babhta leathcheannais Ghlór Tíre 2026 beo! Is féidir do vóta a chaitheamh anois. (The live semifinal of Glór Tíre 2026. Voting is open.)

programmes.show_name: Taste of Australia with Hayden Quinn
programmes.show_description: Téann Hayden ag seoltóireacht lena sheanathair i gCalafort Sydney. (Hayden goes sailing with his grandfather on the famous Sydney Harbour.)
Clár ceoil tíre á chur i láthair ag Jo Ní Chéide. (Country music videos filmed on location in Ireland and presented by Jo Ní Chéide.)
Tá Celia agus Pat tinn den árasán beag atá acu i Sydney. (Life in a cramped Sydney flat has Celia and Pat dreaming of the open spaces.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Éiríonn Hal as a phost agus rún aige a bheith ina ealaíontóir. (Hal quits his job to become an artist.)
Clár nuachta do dhaoine óga ina gclúdaítear scéalta áitiúla, náisiúnta agus idirnáisiúnta. (News programme for young people covering local, national and international news.)
Tabharfar léargas ar nósanna na n-ainmhithe atá ag cur fúthu san Antartach. (This episode begins to explore the diverse habitats of our southernmost continent.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Sraith ceoil thraidisiúnta nua ó Scoil Samhraidh Joe Mooney i nDroim Seanbhó. (This new traditional music series comes from the Joe Mooney Summer School in Drumshanbo.)
Tugtar spléachadh sa tsraith seo ar an díograis a theastaíonn chun seónna talmhaíochta a bhuachan. (This series celebrates the passion needed to be Ireland's 'Best in Show'.)
Deir an t-údar Dick Cavett go seolfaidh sé chuimhní cinn Sam chuig a fhoilsitheoir. (Author Dick Cavett offers to send Sam's memoirs to his publisher.)
Tugann an clár faisnéise seo cúrsaí cumhachta, féiniúlachta agus ról na mban san antoisceacha chun solais. (This documentary looks at the role of women in extremism.)
Téann Rudy sa seans ag tús na trialach agus déanann Sarah beart suarach. (As the trial begins, Rudy pulls a risky move, while Sarah goes lower than ever before.)
Tá ceant Survivor ar ais ach ní mar a shíltear a bhítear! (The classic Survivor auction is back with a twist!)
